attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.SHIP_SET_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.HIST_CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.HIST_CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LATEST_CANCELLED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.CANCELLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.CANCELLED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.HIST_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.HIST_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_SET_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINK_TO_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.ORDERED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REQUEST_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.RETURN_REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.SALESREP_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REASON_ID 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY,
 (
 select LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY
 minus
 select LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_OE_ORD_LINES_HIST
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LINE_ID = STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_HISTORY)
